E1.Info: Senku continues in trying to advance the Stone World, this time he makes "space food", it is in actuality cup noodles. After Senku finishes his project, Gen has an epiphany and devises a plan to take down Tsukasa's army without violence.
E1.Subtitle: available
E1.Title: Stone Wars Beginning

E2.Info: While Senku's diversion buys Gen and others some time, soon Homura realizes something is not right.
E2.Subtitle: available
E2.Title: Hot Line

E3.Info: Taiju and Yuzuriha are on the verge of tears after they hear Senku's voice, and Senku informs them of his plan to win the war without any bloodshed.
E3.Subtitle: available
E3.Title: Call from the Dead

E4.Info: Chrome and Magma struggle with Ukro, while Senku gets his hands busy with building up an invention; a new hope.
E4.Subtitle: available
E4.Title: Full Assault

E5.Info: The final touches to the automobile are made and it is used to transport the science supplies to a fortified cliffside that's close to the Tsukasa empire. From there the automobile is upgraded into a tank, but unbeknownst to the rescue group preparations by the empire have been made to counter any vehicular attack.
E5.Subtitle: available
E5.Title: Steam Gorilla

E6.Info: Chrome must use all of his scientific knowledge to escape from his prison and save Senku and others.
E6.Subtitle: available
E6.Title: Prison Break

E7.Info: Chrome makes it back to the Kingdom of Science's base, where he bears witness to the Steam Gorilla for the first time. Meanwhile, with the help of the others and with his fake Lilian voice, Gen manages to convert even more people away from the Tsukasa Empire.
E7.Subtitle: available
E7.Title: Secret Mission

E8.Info: The Final Battle for the miracle cave starts as Senku and the Kingdom of Science conduct a frontal assault on the cave.
E8.Subtitle: available
E8.Title: Final Battle

E9.Info: Tsukasa and Hyoga are coming to capture the miracle cave. The Kingdom of Science must buy Senku and Chrome some time to turn the tide, or it is all over.
E9.Subtitle: available
E9.Title: To Destroy and to Save

E10.Info: A truce is called between the Kingdom of Science and Tsukasa Empire. All appears to be well, but some of the Kingdom's dynamite is missing.
E10.Subtitle: available
E10.Title: Humanity's Strongest Tag Team

E11.Info: The Kingdom of Science is victorious, however it is not over for Senku. Senku must use all of his knowledge to cure Tsukasa who is severely injured.
E11.Subtitle: available
E11.Title: Prologue of Dr. Stone
